nodes.name: Webhook: claim-intake
nodes.notes: POST /claim-intake. Accepts multipart/form-data; the uploaded photo lands in binary property 'data'. Responds via the Respond to Webhook nodes.

nodes.name: Generate correlation_id
nodes.notes: Step 2: generate correlation_id (UUID) BEFORE any Attio call so retries are idempotent. Also normalizes form fields and derives the merchant SERVER-SIDE (the customer never picks it). Sets parcel_value = merchant ceiling (the value submitted to Evri), kept separate from cost_value (customer-stated).

nodes.name: Upsert Person
nodes.notes: Step 3: PUT /v2/objects/people/records, matching on email_addresses. Returns the person record id at data.id.record_id.

nodes.name: Upsert Merchant (companies)
nodes.notes: Step 4: resolve merchant -> companies record id. Upserts the server-side-derived merchant by domain and sets its ceiling. Returns the company record id at data.id.record_id.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { data: { values: { name: $('Generate correlation_id').item.json.merchant.name, domains: [$('Generate correlation_id').item.json.merchant.domain], ceiling: $('Generate correlation_id').item.json.merchant.ceiling } } } }}

nodes.name: Create Claim
nodes.notes: Step 5: POST /v2/objects/claims/records. Links customer (people) + merchant (companies), status New. parcel_value = ceiling submitted to Evri; cost_value = customer-stated. Returns claim record id at data.id.record_id.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { data: { values: { correlation_id: $('Generate correlation_id').item.json.correlation_id, order_number: $('Generate correlation_id').item.json.order_number, courier: $('Generate correlation_id').item.json.courier, tracking_number: $('Generate correlation_id').item.json.tracking_number, additional_tracking: $('Generate correlation_id').item.json.additional_tracking, claim_type: $('Generate correlation_id').item.json.claim_type, parcel_count: $('Generate correlation_id').item.json.parcel_count, delivery_postcode: $('Generate correlation_id').item.json.delivery_postcode, phone_number: $('Generate correlation_id').item.json.phone, customer_comment: $('Generate correlation_id').item.json.customer_comment, status: 'New', cost_value: $('Generate correlation_id').item.json.cost_value, parcel_value: $('Generate correlation_id').item.json.parcel_value, customer: [{ target_object: 'people', target_record_id: $('Upsert Person').item.json.data.id.record_id }], merchant: [{ target_object: 'companies', target_record_id: $('Upsert Merchant (companies)').item.json.data.id.record_id }] } } } }}

nodes.name: Upload Photo
nodes.notes: Step 6: POST /v2/files (multipart). Streams the webhook's binary photo, linked to the claim record id. NOTE: verify exact /v2/files field names against the current Attio API before going live (file-upload params change more often than record endpoints).

nodes.name: Evri only?
nodes.notes: Phase 1 gate: only Evri claims are processed by the agent. Non-Evri couriers are captured in Attio but skip processing. true -> Process Claim; false -> Respond: captured (non-Evri).

nodes.name: Process Claim (FastAPI)
nodes.notes: Step 7: POST {AGENT_BASE_URL or http://localhost:8000}/claims/{correlation_id}/process. Hands the claim to the FastAPI agent service (extract -> enrich -> decide -> generate -> dispatch). Idempotent on correlation_id.

nodes.name: Respond: processed
nodes.notes: Step 8: 200 + claim reference for processed Evri claims.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, correlation_id: $('Generate correlation_id').item.json.correlation_id, claim_record_id: $('Create Claim').item.json.data.id.record_id, status: 'New', message: 'Claim captured and Evri processing started.' } }}

nodes.name: Respond: captured (non-Evri)
nodes.notes: Step 8 (non-Evri branch): 200 + claim reference; processing is Evri-only in Phase 1.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, correlation_id: $('Generate correlation_id').item.json.correlation_id, claim_record_id: $('Create Claim').item.json.data.id.record_id, courier: $('Generate correlation_id').item.json.courier, message: 'Claim captured. Automated processing is Evri-only in Phase 1.' } }}
